{{Quote|Tonight is my time. I take leadership of the Skaak Tippers outside of Kaadara and I take my Skaak Tipper name, Jonni Skaak. The past is nothing. It's gone. Only my future matters and it awaits.|Jonthol Mazoon|<ref name="SWG:TLaDoJS" />}}
'''Jonni Skaak''', formerly '''Jonthol Mazoon''', was the leader of the [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] branch of [[Skaak Tippers]] until he was [[Assassin/Legends|assassinated]] by agents of the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|I'm very excited about my next assignment. I am to infiltrate the Skaak Tippers by posing as a minor criminal and then joining them. This kind of thing is exactly why I became an RSF Agent.|Jonthol Mazoon|<ref name="SWG:TLaDoJS" />}}
Born to [[Harriet Mazoon]], Skaak was himself a former RSF officer. His first mission was to reduce the [[nightspider]] population around [[Kaadara]] and eliminate the giant nightspider [[Noctur'lan]]. He was then assigned to break up a local group of [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] who call themselves [[Beachcombers]] and arrest their leader, [[Phranis Bolgar]]. After this success, he was sent to investigate the activities of the Skaak Tippers. Becoming more and more entangled in the Skaak Tippers, he killed their leader and took up leadership himself.<ref name="SWG:TLaDoJS" /> The RSF agent who [[Raid on the Skaak Tipper Hideout|killed]] him found his journal which told the story of his career as a Skaak Tipper leader.<ref name="SWG:Ttb" /><ref name="SWG:TLaDoJS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Jonni Skaak appeared as a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:Ttb" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Jonni Skaak was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:Legacy Quest|Legacy Quest]]" with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]", a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
